home.headline: We build intelligence inside the enterprise
home.subline: A Saudi AI transformation and cybersecurity firm. We embed intelligence into sovereign, industrial, and enterprise operations — from the field floor to the C-suite.
home.foundingNote: Founding Client Program — Free assessment for first 3 clients
home.prop1Body: 5-day on-site assessment with our proprietary DX-OS tool, resulting in a comprehensive transformation report.
home.prop2Body: Build intelligent systems, integrate them with your operations, and train your team to run them.
home.prop3Body: Delivered through partnerships with leading security firms in Saudi Arabia and Egypt.
home.trackDisclaimer: Work listed was executed by the founding team in prior roles. InfraAI was founded in March 2026 — CR No. 7053788142.
home.spec1Body: End-to-end AI adoption: assessment, design, implementation, and operation of AI-native workflows.
home.spec2Body: Sovereign-grade security solutions through elite partnerships in Saudi Arabia and Egypt.
home.foundingBody: The first 3 clients receive a full field assessment (valued at 10,000 SAR) at no cost, in exchange for an optional reference letter post-engagement.

ai.headline: We don't consult from a distance. We build from within.
ai.subline: Comprehensive field assessment with DX-OS technology, followed by full AI system implementation.
ai.method1Body: Team interviews, workflow mapping, data analysis, and full documentation of your current digital maturity.
ai.method2Body: Comprehensive AI-generated report covering gaps, opportunities, and a complete transformation roadmap.
ai.model2Body: Build and integrate custom intelligent systems tailored to your operations.
ai.model3Body: Ready-to-scale software solutions across multiple sectors.

cyber.headline: Sovereign Cybersecurity — Through Elite Partnerships.
cyber.subline: InfraAI is not a security vendor. We are the integration and orchestration layer.
cyber.positionBody: We work with leading cybersecurity firms in Saudi Arabia and Egypt to deliver sovereign, integrated solutions to our clients. One client, one contract, one point of accountability.
cyber.partnerBody: We partner with leading firms in Saudi Arabia and Egypt — identities disclosed under NDA to qualified clients.

about.headline: Built to Close the Gap
about.story: InfraAI was founded with a single conviction: Saudi and Gulf enterprises don't need remote consulting — they need partners who go on-site, build the systems, and run them until they work.
about.story2: Our founders came together after years of delivering AI and digital transformation inside sovereign institutions in Saudi Arabia and Egypt — from the Ministry of Interior to the Ministries of Tourism and Antiquities, through NUPCO and the healthcare sector.
about.story3: We found that the gap is not in technology — it's in who has the expertise, field depth, and local network simultaneously. InfraAI was built to close that gap.
about.f1Tag: AI product engineer with experience in Saudi and Egyptian sovereign projects
about.f2Title: Founding Partner — Business Development & Government Relations
about.f2Tag: Deep expertise in the Saudi market and institutional relationships
about.f3Tag: Specialization in digital governance frameworks and emerging technologies
about.f4Tag: 15 years in Saudi construction and large-scale project management

track.headline: Founding Team Track Record
track.subline: InfraAI is new. Our team is not. Below are projects delivered by our founding partners in their prior roles before the company was established.
track.disclaimer: All work listed was executed in prior roles before InfraAI's founding. Presented as the founding team's experience record, not as company projects.
track.p1Title: Financial Fraud Operations Room — Saudi Ministry of Interior
track.p1Body: Inter-agency workflow design across 8 Saudi entities: SSP, CST, MOC, NIC, SAMA, CMA, NCA, and GCAM. Field-by-field request/response documentation for a sovereign-grade compliance architecture.
track.p2Title: Vehicle Booking & Delivery Service — Saudi Ministry of Interior
track.p2Body: Multi-agency workflow documentation for state vehicle seizure and delivery, built to sovereign compliance standards.
track.p3Title: Digital Transformation — Egyptian Ministry of Tourism
track.p3Body: Modernization of the Egyptian Ministry of Tourism's digital services at the national level.
track.p4Title: Digital Transformation — Egyptian Ministry of Antiquities
track.p4Body: Digitization of Egypt's cultural heritage and antiquities management system at national scale.
track.p5Body: Digital transformation of procurement and healthcare operations for Saudi Arabia's largest healthcare procurement company.
track.p6Body: Built the Remora copy-trading platform from zero to launch at Squadio.

industries.headline: Industries We Serve
industries.subline: Real field expertise in Saudi Arabia's strategic sectors.
industries.ind1Body: 850+ mid-size Saudi construction firms, 5B SAR digital transformation market by 2030. Direct field expertise from COO Ahmed Maher's 15 years in the sector.
industries.ind2Body: IVF clinic management system ready for launch. Direct experience at NUPCO, Saudi Arabia's largest healthcare procurement platform.
industries.ind3Body: AI for fraud detection, operations optimization, and compliance automation. Field experience in the Financial Fraud Operations Room at Saudi MOI.
industries.ind4Body: Sovereign digital transformation project management, Vision 2030 alignment, and inter-agency operations design.
